name: libfile-touch-perl
title: libfile-touch-perl
description:
Perl interface to touch-like functions
File::Touch lets you update access and modification timestamps, creating
nonexistent files where necessary. It also allows you to only modify one of
the stamps, choose to not create nonexistent files, and use timestamps from
a different file.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libfile-touch-perl because Perl interface to touch-like functions.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libfile-touch-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libfile-touch-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libfile-touch-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
